raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I was expecting delivery of a high-value order ( approximately {$3000.00} ) from XXXX, XXXX via XXXX XXXX under XXXX tracking numbers : XXXX, XXXX, and XXXX. 

The order included XXXX XXXX XXXX curved monitors and XXXX keyboard. However, I only received one monitor and the keyboard. The second monitorvalued at $ XXXXwas never delivered. 

Despite the high value of the shipment, no signature was collected. According to XXXX XXXX any package with a declared value of {$500.00} or more should automatically require a Direct Signature, yet this safeguard was ignored. I contacted XXXX, and they confirmed : No signature was obtained No delivery photo was available Responsibility lies with the shipper ( XXXX ) I reached out to XXXX, and they initially acknowledged the issue and created a replacement order, but then canceled it without explanation the next day. 

I filed a dispute with American Express under goods not received. They requested that I submit a formal letter documenting the situation, which I faxed and also submitted with supporting attachments. Despite providing all requested materials, Amex has not followed up or provided any resolution. 

I am now left with a {$1800.00} loss for an item that was never delivered, no clear proof of delivery from XXXX, no resolution from XXXX, and no further response from American Express.
